steps.title: Use the before-and-after contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts a time when few minor planets had been discovered with the present, when over 500,000 are known and naming each one is nearly impossible. The blank must describe the earlier task as achievable.

steps.title: Reject the wrong qualities
steps.content: A means unclear, C means large or important, and D means impossible. None fits a task that could be done when there were fewer minor planets to name. The answer is B.
